title: My Son Stole My $70K, Sold The Funeral Home For $1.5M, Gave Me A $5K Card. So I Bought It Back.
description: After 25 years as embalmer and bookkeeper, my son stole my pension, sold our funeral home, and handed me a $5K card. But I discovered his fraud, triggered an investigation that yanked his license, and purchased the assets at auction for $40K, turning it into a green-burial cooperative where he now mows the meadow under my supervision. #MothersRevenge #FuneralHomeBetrayal #GreenBurial
thumb_text: I BOUGHT THE FUNERAL HOME. NOW HE MOWS MY MEADOW.
pinned_comment: If your son stole your $70K pension, forged your equity, and handed you a $5K thank-you card, what would you have done? Share your story if something similar happened to you.

thumb_lines.text: I REPORTED HIS PREPAID FUNERAL FRAUD
